primary_sources.notes: India GCC ecosystem: 1,800+ centres, $46B in revenue. Cost structure benchmarks for talent-heavy captive operations.

primary_sources.source_name: Everest Group GCC State of the Market 2024
primary_sources.notes: Benchmarks for GCC cost structure: talent 60-70% of total cost, infra 10-15%.

primary_sources.source_name: WNS Holdings FY25 Annual Report (NSE: WNS)
primary_sources.notes: BPO proxy for GCC cost structure. Revenue $1.3B, Staff costs ~61% of revenue.
BPO/GCC proxy. Revenue $4.5B, Staff costs ~60% of revenue.
India-listed BPO proxy. Revenue ~₹7,500 Cr, Employee costs ~64%.

source_metadata.methodology: P25/P50/P75 derived from FY2024-25 disclosures of 5 India-based BPO/captive proxies (WNS, Genpact, Firstsource, Mphasis, iGate). GCC captive operations are unlisted so BPO third-party proxies and NASSCOM/Everest published ranges are used. P90 represents structurally high-cost outlier scenarios.

HR.source_note: Talent cost % of total GCC operating cost. WNS FY25: 61%, Genpact FY25: 60%, Firstsource FY25: 64%. Everest Group GCC survey: 60-70% range. P25 reflects best-in-class offshore talent mix with automation offsets.

FACILITIES.source_note: Rent + property costs. NASSCOM GCC 2024: India office costs ₹60-100/sqft/month. Tier-1 cities higher. WNS FY25 property costs ~5.2%, Firstsource ~7.1%.

IT.source_note: IT infra, software, cloud costs. Everest Group GCC 2024: Technology infrastructure 10-15% of GCC cost base. Best-in-class GCCs with shared cloud infra at 5-7%.

TELECOM.source_note: Connectivity and telecom costs for offshore delivery. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — estimated from 6 India GCC engagements.

TRAVEL.source_note: Travel & visa costs for GCC staff. Higher than pure IT services due to client-site travel. Genpact FY25 T&E ~2.2%, WNS ~1.8%.

PROF_SVCS.source_note: Legal, audit, consulting. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — estimated from GCC setup and ongoing compliance costs.

MARKETING.source_note: Talent branding and recruitment marketing. GCCs spend less on external marketing vs product companies. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.

INSURANCE.source_note: Group health, professional indemnity, D&O. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — calibrated from India GCC benefit structures.

CONTINGENT.source_note: Contract/contingent workforce. NASSCOM GCC 2024: gig and contract labour rising in GCCs; 10-20% of headcount mix.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Third-party subcontracting (overflow, niche skills). Genpact FY25 subcontractor costs ~6.1%, WNS ~5.4%.
